records.heading: Observe RHP-015.7 sealed commit/current HEAD
records.why: RHP-015.8 starts from the already-published RHP-015.7 seal.

records.heading: Render wound taxonomy registry
records.why: Promote repeated failure classes into stable named wound classes.

records.heading: Render non-executing proposal packet
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m rhp.proposal_packet --wound-class remote_ci_pending --subject commit:ef64388aa90804701a3fdff6a77e1d9f58ca6097 --summary RHP-015.8 proposal scaffold: classify current CI/state condition without executing repair. --allowed-path docs/context-layer/ops/RHP-015-8* --allowed-path rhp/wound_taxonomy.py --allowed-path rhp/proposal_packet.py --test-command python -m pytest -q -o addopts= tests/test_rhp_015_8_wound_taxonomy.py tests/test_rhp_015_8_proposal_packet.py --risk-level low --out C:\Users\jacks\OneDrive\Desktop\hermes-agent-evo\docs\context-layer\ops\RHP-015-8-wound-taxonomy-proposal-evidence\proposal-packet.json
records.why: Proposal carries allowed paths, tests, risk, rollback, and authority boundary; it does not execute.

records.heading: Run doctor with bounded operation dirty mode
records.why: Confirm cockpit can classify state while this authorized operation is constructing bounded files.

records.heading: Compile RHP-015.8 wound/proposal surfaces
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m py_compile rhp/wound_taxonomy.py rhp/proposal_packet.py tests/test_rhp_015_8_wound_taxonomy.py tests/test_rhp_015_8_proposal_packet.py
records.why: Catch syntax/import issues before focused tests.

records.heading: Run wound/proposal focused tests
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m pytest -q -o addopts= tests/test_rhp_015_8_wound_taxonomy.py tests/test_rhp_015_8_proposal_packet.py tests/test_rhp_015_7_state_machine.py tests/test_rhp_015_7_rhpload_doctor.py
records.why: Prove wound taxonomy, proposal packet, doctor, and state machine before push.
